description: Triggers when the user wants to create a hand-drawn style diagram using Excalidraw

queries.query: create an Excalidraw diagram for the system architecture
draw a whiteboard-style sketch of the user registration flow
excalidraw concept map with product strategy at the center
sketch a C4 context diagram for our SaaS application
hand-drawn architecture diagram for the microservices system
draw an informal org chart for the product team in Excalidraw
whiteboard diagram showing how the components interact
create an Excalidraw file I can embed in my Obsidian note
quick sketch of the three-tier web architecture
draw a mind map in excalidraw with six branches
create a mermaid flowchart for the login process
add wikilinks to my Obsidian note
create an Obsidian canvas layout with my strategy notes
optimize my resume for a product manager role
write a Python script to process image files
summarize this YouTube video about design systems
add frontmatter tags to this Obsidian note
transcribe this audio recording to markdown
analyze the competitive landscape for our product
write a state machine diagram using mermaid stateDiagram-v2
